text.title: Form Requests, API Resources, and Controller
text.summary: Form Request with authorize() and toDTO(), API Resource with conditional fields, and thin controller.

rule.statement: Form Requests must implement authorize() using a Policy. Never rely on controller-level checks alone. Always call $request->validated() — never $request->all() or $request->input().
rule.rationale: authorize() in Form Requests runs before the controller action. Checking authorization in the controller is too late; validation has already consumed the request body.

rule.statement: Use $this->whenLoaded() for relationship fields in API Resources. Never call $resource->relationship directly in toArray() — it triggers a lazy load.
rule.rationale: whenLoaded() returns the relationship only if already eager-loaded. Direct access triggers a lazy query, defeating the purpose of eager loading in the controller.
